TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Karamemedesane, title = Karamemedesane, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Karamemedesane} }

S.FORM: alang Karamemedesane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 127 buwan, 417 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 414 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 88%, Paywan 9%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Karamemedesane hya' ga Kabalelradhane. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Karamemedesane ga maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Karamemedesane ga niya mki sku Heto Keng atu Butay go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 127 buwan, 417 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 99% kyan ku 414 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 1% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Rukay 88%, Paywan 9%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. rhzyal kki'an tay mkyahu' na Karamemedesane hya' ga Kabalelradhane. rekisi kayal kyokay qalang Karamemedesane ga maki 2 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ karameme*es~ɕane ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ħeto keŋ atu βutaj ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, rukaj **%, pajwan *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj mkjaħuʔ na karameme*es~ɕane ħjaʔ ɣa kaβalelra*ħane. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj qalaŋ karameme*es~ɕane ɣa maki * kjokaj. s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
